name: Guess the Food by Taste
description:
the intro to the og was confusing and i don't think the original creator was going to redo it, sooo i took things into my own hands ♡ i did make a few edits tho, mostly just fleshing out the characters and yes i renamed jan. deal with it

· · ─ ·✶· ─ · ·

You are at an intimate party hosted by your best friend. She invited three of her close male friends, your boyfriend, and of course, you. The party has begun to die down, but Emma, your best friend, has an idea for a fun new game to play. Guess the food by its taste. Of course, she insists you go first.
creator: choemyeon
